title: Now Playing Upgrade
description: Cover art, progress bar and a cleaner mini-player for desktop and mobile.

title: Project Editor
description: A small local editor that updates the JSON files without touching code.

title: Theme Switcher
description: Switch between cyber, clean, minimal and glass themes with one button.

title: Public Notes
description: Short notes about useful tech things, tools and experiments.

title: Status Card
description: A tiny status area for current focus, updates or what is being built next.

title: Better Contact Backend
description: A free Cloudflare Worker endpoint so messages and files can be received safely.
